heading_content_part: abisoft - load shedding notifier privacy policyLoad Shedding Notifier privacy policyWhen you use apps, you trust the developer with your information. This Privacy Policy is meant to help you understand what		data is collected by abisoft, why we collect it, and what we do with it. This is important; we hope you will take time		to read it carefully.

Personal informationPersonal information includes your name, address, telephone number, email address, credit card information, and similar data.		Load Shedding Notifier optionally records anonymous location data, in order to assist users with determining the best area to use based on		their current location. This data is in no way associated with you as a person. You need to enable location data before we can record it.		You can switch this off at any time from the privacy settings in the app.

Device informationDevice information includes your hardware model, operating system version, unique device identifiers, mobile network information,		and similar data. Load Shedding Notifier stores anonymous device information on a third party server in order to send push notifications to		your device.Log informationLoad Shedding Notifier does not automatically capture logs from the app. However, in the event of an app crash, you may be prompted to send

the app logs to Abisoft or a third party. These logs include information about the state of the app at the time of the crash		and may be used by Abisoft to improve the stability of the app.Third partiesLoad Shedding Notifier makes use of several third party libraries, which may capture additional data through the app. Anonymous data is shared		with the following third parties:Google Analytics

The following information is collected by Google for the purpose of analysing user behaviour: Date and time of visit,		Usage data, Click path, App updates, Browser information, Device information, JavaScript support, Pages visited, Referrer URL,		Downloads, Flash version, Location information, Purchase activity, Widget interactions, IP address.More information can be obtainedhere.Google Admob

Google collects and shares the following data types automatically for advertising, analytics, and fraud prevention purposes:		Advertising identifier, Ads viewed, Cookie ID, Date and time of visit, Device information, Geographic location, IP address,		Search terms, Ads shown, Client ID, Impressions, Online identifiers, Browser information.		The optional advertising identifier is used for ad personalisation.More information can be obtainedhere.AdColony Inc.

AdColony collects and shares the following data types automatically for advertising and analytics purposes:		Advertising identifier, Device information, Operating system information, Geographic location, IP address, Gender, Demographic data.		The optional advertising identifier is used for ad personalisation.More information can be obtainedhere.Huq Industries LimitedThe below information is collected on an anonymous basis, and shared with Huq industries Limited for their business purposes, including

the creation of reports, market research and trend analysis: Operating System, BluetoothName, Carrier Code (Android only), Carrier Name,		Sim Code, Charging Status, Device Model, Device Manufacturer, Country, Locale, Bundle ID, Date & time, SSID (network), BSSID (network),		Latitude, Longitude, Accuracy (GPS), Scanned networks.		Data shared does not contain information from which users can be identified and we will not provide additional information to such third
